rulings.Case Title: LILLIAN LIBERATORE VS. GERALD LIBERATORE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Craig Liberatores Notice Of And Motion To Quash
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT CRAIG LIBERATORE's Motion To Quash continued to October 25, 2018. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers no later than October 12, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIENNA DUNN ET AL VS. MERCY HOUSING MANAGMENT GROUP, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING MANAGMENT GROUP, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the request for punitive damages under CC 3294. Non-opposition filed. Motion is otherwise denied. Sufficient facts are alleged to support claim for punitive damages under CC 1942.5 re: conscious disregard of Plaintiff's rights and safety. Request to strike request for emotional distress damages is denied. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that these types of damages are never recoverable as an item of general or special damages under the alleged causes of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIENNA DUNN ET AL VS. MERCY HOUSING MANAGMENT GROUP, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING MANAGMENT GROUP, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend at to SFRO Violation Causes of action. Non-opposition filed. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Sufficient ultimate facts are alleged to state each cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORVIN VASQUEZ ET AL VS. ROGER TONNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANTs ROGER TONNA and MARY TONNA's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED, response to be filed in 10 days. Moving party failed to sustain its burden. Defendants' declarations are internally inconsistent and will not be considered by the Court (see paragraph 7 and place of execution). Therefore, there is no competent evidence to challenge the service registered process server. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Motion And Notice Of Motion To Amend Answer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT DAMIEN QUINN'S Motion To Amend Answer GRANTED. Second Amended Answer to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAME QARE VS. ERIC DAIGLE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 3, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT ERIC DAIGLE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. Plaintiff provided inaccurate information regarding tenant's rights. = (501/REQ)
